subjects.content:
🎨 Design Phase

 

Design Deliverables:

  • 🖼️ UI/UX Mockups
    • User flows
    • Interactive prototypes
    • Design system
  • 👥 Stakeholder Review
    • Design presentation
    • Feedback collection
    • Iteration plan

Design review scheduled for next week 📅

⚙️ Development Setup

Component Status
CI/CD Pipeline ⏳ In Progress
Testing Framework ✅ Configured
Git Repository ✅ Initialized

DevOps team assisting with pipeline setup 🛠️

🔨 Core Features Development

Social login integration

    • Email verification
  • 👤 Profile Management
    • Avatar upload
    • Preferences
  • 📱 Core Features
    • Data sync
    • Offline support

🧪 Quality Assurance

Test Coverage Requirements:

  • ✅ Unit Tests - 90% coverage
  • ⏳ Integration Tests - 75% coverage
  • 📱 E2E Tests - Key user flows
  • 🔄 Performance Tests - Load & stress

Critical: Security audit pending 🔒

📣 Marketing Campaign

📱 App Store Presence:

  • 🎯 ASO Keywords
    • Primary: "mobile productivity"
    • Secondary: "task management"
  • 📸 Screenshots & Videos
    • Feature highlights
    • User testimonials
  • 📝 Store Description
    • Feature list
    • USP highlights



Marketing assets due by Friday 📅

🚀 Launch Strategy

Target Launch Date: March 1st, 2024

 

Launch Checklist:

  • ✅ Beta testing complete
  • ✅ Production environment ready
  • ⏳ Final security audit
  • 📊 Analytics implementation
  • 🔄 Rollback procedures
  • 📱 Store submissions

 

All teams aligned on launch timeline 🎯
